sections.description: Prometheus-compatible HTTP query API implementation that provides instant queries, range queries, series discovery, label querying, and build information endpoints.
sections.purpose: Wires the Prometheus PromQL engine to the metrics store's Queryable adapter, exposing all standard Prometheus HTTP API endpoints for time series querying and metadata retrieval.
strengths: Full Prometheus API compatibility - implements all standard /api/v1 endpoints (query, query_range, series, labels, label values, metadata, buildinfo)
Robust parameter parsing - handles both RFC3339 and Unix timestamp formats for time parameters, supports both Go duration and seconds notation for step
Comprehensive error handling - distinguishes between query cancellation, timeout, storage, and execution errors with appropriate Prometheus error types
Clean dependency injection - constructor takes logger, queryable, engine, and build info; no global state
Well-structured response formatting - standardized apiResponse format matching Prometheus spec with proper status, error, and warning fields
weaknesses: Limited error logging - only logs errors when closing queriers; other errors are silently returned in JSON responses without server-side logging context
Metadata endpoint stub - /api/v1/metadata returns empty object rather than actual metric metadata
No input validation for max samples or memory limits - relies entirely on engine configuration
Missing query validation warnings - doesn't surface potential issues like large time ranges to clients
sections.test_coverage: High test coverage with parallel subtests for: instant query (GET and POST), range query, series endpoint, label names, label values, metadata, buildinfo, invalid query syntax, missing parameters. Uses testify assert/require and helper functions for common test patterns.
dependencies: github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql - PromQL engine for query execution
github.com/prometheus/prometheus/storage - Queryable interface for data access
internal/store - provides Queryable adapter (store.NewQueryable) and in-memory store for testing
functionality: Instant Query (/api/v1/query) - single point-in-time metric values with optional time parameter (defaults to now)
Range Query (/api/v1/query_range) - time series data over range with required start, end, step parameters
Series (/api/v1/series) - find all series matching label selectors via match[] parameter
Label Names (/api/v1/labels) - list all label names in database with optional start/end time range
Label Values (/api/v1/label/{name}/values) - list all values for a specific label with optional time range
Metadata (/api/v1/metadata) - returns empty object (placeholder for metric metadata)
Build Info (/api/v1/status/buildinfo) - version, revision, branch, build date, Go version
HTTP Handler - registers all routes on http.ServeMux, supports both GET and POST with form-encoded parameters
files: api.go - main API implementation with all endpoint handlers, parameter parsing helpers, response formatting, error classification
api_test.go - comprehensive test suite covering all endpoints, error cases, parameter validation
